memory_ops.description: Memory write requests. Use an empty array when scoped memory should not change.

items.description: One validated memory write request. The orchestrator persists applied writes.

op.description: Use add for a new entry, replace to update one existing entry, and remove to delete one existing entry.

scope.description: Where to write the memory. Prefer conversation unless a channel-wide or global memory is clearly needed.

content.description: Full entry for add/replace. Empty string for remove.

old_text.description: Empty string for add. Short unique substring of the existing entry for replace/remove.

schedule_ops.description: Scheduled task operation requests. Use an empty array when schedules should not change.

match.description: Natural-language selector for update/remove/pause/resume/run_now when job_id is unknown.

prompt.description: Self-contained scheduled task prompt for create/update. Empty string when unchanged.

schedule.description: Use ISO timestamp, duration like 30m, interval like every 2h, or cron expression.

repeat.description: Positive repeat count, or null for default/infinite depending on schedule kind.

skills.description: Skill names to attach to a new job. Use [] for prompt-only jobs.

skill_ops.description: Reusable skill file requests. Use an empty array when skills should not change.

name.description: Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.

description.description: Skill trigger description for create/update. Empty for remove.

content.description: SKILL.md body or full SKILL.md content for create/update. Empty for remove.
